name: My comp claim got denied in Riverton, what now?
description: Appeal via conference/hearing; lawyer helps overturn.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: My comp claim got denied in Riverton, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal via conference/hearing; lawyer helps overturn.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request hearing or Claims Resolution Conference in Utah; appeal to commission in Idaho.[1][3] Key factors: Prove compensable via evidence.[3] Don't miss deadlines.[1] Get lawyer for disputes.[3]
